label: Switch
description: Evaluate an expression and route to the matching case branch. Supports a default fallback case.

settings.name: expression
settings.label: Expression
settings.description: JS expression whose result is matched against case values. Supports {{template}} vars.

settings.name: cases
settings.label: Cases
settings.description: Array of { value, label } objects. Add a case with value='default' as a fallback.

ai.shortDescription: Multi-way branch based on an expression value.
ai.whenToUse: When you need more than two branches — e.g. route based on a status field with 3+ possible values.
ai.examplePrompt: switch on input.priority and route to high/medium/low branches
ai.promptHints: Each case value is matched as a string against String(expressionResult). A case with value='default' matches when nothing else does.

outputAssertions.name: switch_case_selected
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Switch node did not produce a matched-case label — the routing decision is missing.

outputAssertions.name: switch_expression_evaluated
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Switch node's safe expression evaluator returned undefined — the expression failed to evaluate.
